item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: GREEN DISH: curry packed with vegetables, warm and aromatic, served with grilledcauliflower steak and steamed rice. Topped with crispy kale and fresh herbs (4+10+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Aloo bharta, Indian spiced mashed potatoes with ginger, garlic and turmeric,warm and aromatic, topped with fresh herbs, spiced chickpeas and crispy friedcarrot. Served with fresh kachumber salad and salted yoghurt on the side (2+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Crisp falafel with a spiced centre, served with bulgur tabbouleh, pickled redcabbage with parsley and sumac, warm flatbread, chili and creamy sour creamdressing (1+6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Minestrone soup with seasonal vegetables and beans, hearty and comforting,served with warm focaccia (1+10+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Rich Indian lentil dahl with warm spices, served with brown rice, cooling raitaand house made naan bread (13+15)
